description_long: This apartment building complex consists of two identical, multi-story structures with pitched, hipped roofs and prominent wraparound balconies on each floor. The buildings are set parallel to each other on a rectangular green lawn, separated by a central open space. The exterior walls are primarily white with brown wooden or wood-like balcony railings and structural accents, giving a warm, inviting appearance. Each building features large, regularly spaced windows and multiple balconies, providing ample natural light and outdoor space for residents. The ground level includes covered parking spaces visible beneath the buildings, and staircases are integrated into the balcony design for vertical circulation. The overall design is symmetrical and functional, with a contemporary yet tropical architectural influence.
description: A pair of symmetrical, multi-story apartment buildings with hipped roofs, wraparound balconies, and covered parking beneath, set on a green lawn with a central open space.
description_view_0: Front view showing both buildings with their main entrances, wraparound balconies, and staircases clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the buildings, the covered parking areas, and the separation between the two structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies and windows, as well as the green space between the buildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the open space between the buildings and the full height of the balcony structures.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on each facade, evenly spaced and aligned with the floors, providing a balanced and orderly appearance.
